title: Open Questions
intro: This registry owns public daemon unresolved questions that are referenced by domain SSOT docs.
Closed implementation decisions should move into the owning domain or architecture document instead of staying here.

questions.question: Should `ConsentLedger` persist only as local JSON append log or also use OS secure storage?
questions.current_handling: Pure model is public; durable OS adapter remains future work.

questions.question: Should private repo auth use a GitHub App installation token, a user PAT broker, or an org-level deploy key?
questions.current_handling: Public repo materialization only; private repo execution fails closed without logging credentials.

questions.question: Should long-lived provider processes be provider default or conversational-task opt-in?
questions.current_handling: One-shot process remains default; explicit provider session id enables resume.

questions.question: What timeout and terminal state should web approval use?
Should `WorkspacePlan` be inline in the assignment snapshot or referenced by execution plan id?
questions.current_handling: Minimal inline snapshot is the current proposal.

questions.question: How long should live answer deltas be retained?
questions.current_handling: Final answer is durable; deltas remain bounded/ephemeral.

questions.question: Should provider real-CLI integration run on a scheduled public workflow?
questions.current_handling: Default PR CI stays deterministic; scheduled/manual integration can be added without bundled CLIs.

promotion_rule: Questions that require shared DTO/schema changes must first be evaluated under the `riido-contracts` promotion rule.

source_checks.name: contracts-promotion-rule
source_checks.contains: same fact in multiple repos must be promoted to riido-contracts instead of copied

assertions: open questions must be generated from the registry instead of hand-authored markdown
shared DTO/schema questions must route through the riido-contracts promotion rule before implementation
resolved decisions must move into the owning generated domain or architecture SSOT
